use_cases: Display hotel search results with images, ratings, and locations
Show accommodation listings in travel booking interfaces
Present featured properties in hospitality platforms
List room options with visual hover effects on booking sites
Display travel destination recommendations with review counts
ai_summary: A responsive hotel card component with framer-motion animations that lifts on hover and zooms the image smoothly. The card displays accommodation details including room type, hotel name, location with a map pin icon, star rating, and review count. It supports optional href for wrapping the entire card in a link and adapts from stacked layout on mobile to horizontal layout on desktop.
